Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It looks like we're all here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Then allow me to jump right in. We have many questions that need answers, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Yesterday, you said the Shadows were here to facilitate the rebirth of the maternal being.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Tell us more about this. What happens if she returns?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Nyx is the mother of Shadows. In ancient times, she bestowed Death upon this world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}If she awakens, the world will be swallowed by darkness, and all life will perish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Are you saying... everyone will die!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It'd be more accurate to say that we'll all surrender the will to live.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Wait, are you... talking about the Lost!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone seems to have arrived[n]at the same conclusion...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Every single human being will[n]become like the Lost...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Leading to the extinction of mankind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the end of the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But there's still a way to stop it from happening, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Don't tell me there's nothing we can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Wait, why're you apologizing!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Are you saying there's no way to stop it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}You heard the bell. That's when it was all decided.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm the Appriser... The Appriser of Death.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}The fact that I'm here at all proves the Fall is coming.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is at a loss for words...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's inevitable... The entire human race[n]will become members of the Lost.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji's existence confirms the[n]impending extinction of mankind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I don't think you'll live to see next spring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}But... that's barely any time at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}H-Heh, what're you guys freakin' out about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Nyx shmyx, am I right? All we gotta do is win and we're golden![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}And we haven't lost a single fight yet, have we!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}When you're up against Nyx, power doesn't mean a thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}It's like trying to fight the inevitable, like death or the flow of time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Nyx can't be defeated. She... just can't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is visibly distraught...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I was born from a collection of Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}But now I have a human form, so I can talk with you, laugh with you, cry with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}It's the gift I received for existing within him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}And because of that, I can give you a choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Nyx's arrival is unavoidable now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 0 25 25}But you can choose to live in peace until she arrives.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}If the Appriser disappears, all recollection of the Dark Hour would go with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}And that would erase any memories of this hopeless reality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}There'd be no way for you to remember anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}When the Fall comes, it'll happen in an instant. You won't have to suffer at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I'm saying you can go back to your normal lives.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}And by doing that, you might buy a little time and delay the Fall, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Technically, I'm the same as Nyx, so I can't be killed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}But thanks to him, there's a part of me that's become human.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}So if it's done by his hand, then it may be possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}If you don't kill me, everything will stay just as it is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}With no hope for salvation, you'll live every day paralyzed by the fear of your impending death.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 10 25 25}And I don't want to put you through something like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}This is something only you can do. No one else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}Well, I definitely don't want my memories erased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}...I don't want my memories to be erased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}I mean, forgetting all this would be like trying to hide from the truth![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}Is that really such a bad thing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 3 25 25}If you don't do this, all that awaits is despair greater than you can possibly imagine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}You don't understand the terror of certain death![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}Don't make your decision without at least thinking about it first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}You don't have to decide right now. There's still some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 83 0 0}December 31st, {f 0 1 33}New Year's Eve{f 0 1 27}. You have until then to think about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}After that, I'll dissolve into the blackness of the Dark Hour and lose my physical form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}When Nyx arrives, I'm going to disappear anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}I'll be back when New Year's Eve rolls around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 91 0 0}I felt Ryoji-kun's presence vanish just now. There's no point in chasing him. He's gone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Ryoji's revelation was all too devastating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The world will soon perish...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mankind is destined for extinction...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A difficult decision lies before me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Death is inevitable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Appriser truly did deliver[n]a death sentence to us all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't think clearly right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How do you even choose[n]the way you want to die?[n]{f 1 1}
